prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年河海大学在天津市综合类最低录取位次分别为约6842名、7401名、8448名、12245名、8339名。2024年出现明显后移（12245名），2025年大幅回升至8339名，近两年波动较大，2025年基准位次约8339名；该校在天津市综合类招生计划：2021–2022年各100人，2023年102人，2024–2025年各104人，2026年（招生计划文件）增至106人，较2025年小幅扩招2人，扩幅约1.9%，对竞争压力略有缓解但作用有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 河海大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第63名，近年排名稳定在60–65名区间，属于中上游211院校；该校在近年声誉监测中未出现明显负面舆情事件，整体声誉平稳；抖音学校热度排名第52位（较热），短视频平台有一定关注度，但未见爆款级传播；历史投档异常记录中无河海大学相关信号；第五轮学科评估中，水利工程获评A+（全国顶尖），土木工程获评A，环境科学与工程获评A，三个A类学科与该校招生专业高度关联（水利类、土木工程、环境工程等），对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度数据显示，计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐，河海大学在上述领域均有招生；天津市2026年高考考生总数预估约82000人，较2025年71938人增长约14%，考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧；省控线方面，天津市本科批分数线从2021年463分缓慢升至2025年476分，整体呈小幅上升趋势；河海大学位于江苏省南京市，属长三角地区，对天津市考生有一定跨省吸引力；该校在天津招生计划约100人左右，占比较小，地域偏好对位次影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次8339名、2026年计划小幅扩招2人（+1.9%）、天津市考生总数大幅增长约14%以及学校声誉平稳、学科实力较强等因素，扩招对竞争略有缓解但考生规模增长是更主要的影响力量，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年小幅后移。预测最低位次约8450名，位次区间7950–8950名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Hohai University in Tianjin's comprehensive category were approximately 6842, 7401, 8448, 12245, and 8339 respectively. In 2024, there was a significant backward shift (12245), and in 2025, it rebounded sharply to 8339, with large fluctuations in the past two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 8339. The enrollment plan for Hohai University in Tianjin's comprehensive category: 100 students each in 2021–2022, 102 in 2023, 104 each in 2024–2025, and 106 in 2026 (according to the enrollment plan document), a slight increase of 2 students compared to 2025, an expansion of about 1.9%, which slightly alleviates competition pressure but has limited effect.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hohai University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 63rd, and in recent years, its ranking has been stable in the 60–65 range, placing it among the upper-middle tier of 211 institutions. In recent reputation monitoring, no significant negative public opinion incidents have been detected, and overall reputation remains stable. On Douyin (TikTok), the university's popularity ranking is 52nd (relatively popular), with some attention on short video platforms but no viral-level dissemination. There are no signals related to Hohai University in historical abnormal admission records. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Water Resources Engineering was rated A+ (top in the country), Civil Engineering was rated A, and Environmental Science and Engineering was rated A. These three A-level disciplines are highly related to the university's enrollment majors (e.g., Water Resources, Civil Engineering, Environmental Engineering), strongly attracting applicants to related programs.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: According to 2026 major popularity data, engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended. Hohai University offers enrollment in these fields. The estimated total number of college entrance exam takers in Tianjin in 2026 is about 82,000, an increase of approximately 14% from 71,938 in 2025, indicating a significant expansion of the candidate pool and intensified competition. Regarding provincial control lines, the undergraduate batch cutoff score in Tianjin has slowly risen from 463 in 2021 to 476 in 2025, showing a slight upward trend. Hohai University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, part of the Yangtze River Delta region, which has some cross-provincial appeal to Tianjin candidates. The university's enrollment plan in Tianjin is about 100 students, a relatively small proportion, so regional preference has a limited impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 8339, the slight enrollment expansion of 2 students in 2026 (+1.9%), the significant increase of about 14% in the total number of candidates in Tianjin, the stable reputation of the university, and its strong academic disciplines, the expansion slightly alleviates competition, but the growth in candidate numbers is the more dominant factor. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will shift slightly backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 8450, with a ranking range of 7950–8950.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 8450, with a range of 7950–8950. Candidates within the predicted range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice (Water Resources and Hydropower Engineering, Software Engineering, Communication Engineering, Energy and Power Engineering, etc.), Tier 1 majors (Computer Science Dayu Class, Water Resources Dayu Class, Electrical Engineering and Automation) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Civil Engineering, Environmental Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, etc.) as safety choices. Hohai University's Water Resources Engineering is an A+ flagship discipline, and related majors have clear employment advantages, so priority consideration is recommended.
